hypothesis: Augment the ∆-learning framework with transition-metal–specific descriptors that proxy local correlation effects (e.g., oxidation state estimates, approximate spin state, and d-electron count) and a metal-site flag, and test whether this TM-aware model reduces the MAE for HSE06 band gaps in 3d-transition-metal MOFs by at least 15% relative to the TM-agnostic ∆-learning model.
